content_opportunities.topic: the science behind a common phenomenon
content_opportunities.why: high engagement rates on similar topics, such as 'The Science Behind Why You REPEAT Songs'
content_opportunities.hook: Have you ever wondered why you always seem to repeat the same songs over and over?
content_opportunities.title: The Science Behind Your Favorite Songs
content_opportunities.urgency: this topic is relevant to many people's daily lives and can be tied to current music trends

content_opportunities.topic: a surprising fact about space or astronomy
content_opportunities.why: high views and engagement on space-related topics, such as 'If You Cry In Space... THIS Happens!'
content_opportunities.hook: You won't believe what happens to your body when you cry in space
content_opportunities.title: The Shocking Truth About Crying in Space
content_opportunities.urgency: space and astronomy topics are consistently popular and can be tied to current events or discoveries

content_opportunities.topic: a mind-blowing fact about the human body
content_opportunities.why: high engagement rates on topics like 'Your Hand Moves Before Your Brain Knows'
content_opportunities.hook: Your body is capable of doing something that will blow your mind
content_opportunities.title: The Crazy Thing Your Body Can Do Without You Even Realizing It
content_opportunities.urgency: interesting facts about the human body are always in demand and can be tied to current health or wellness trends

next_video_brief.topic: the science behind a common phenomenon, such as why we repeat songs
next_video_brief.hook: Have you ever caught yourself repeating the same song over and over and wondered why?
next_video_brief.script_direction: create a engaging and informative video that explores the psychological and scientific reasons behind this phenomenon, including interesting facts and statistics
next_video_brief.title: The Science Behind Your Favorite Songs
next_video_brief.thumbnail_concept: a visually appealing image that represents the topic, such as a person listening to music with a thought bubble
